body_html:
Hey Jenn! Quick question before Sunday's tasting — have you had a chance to check out our full menu yet?

I put together an interactive one with all 99+ items and a price calculator:
https://rawdre.github.io/comeketo-menu-landing/

Just curious — what's been your experience with catering so far? Any challenges you've faced with other caterers?

No pressure at all, just want to make sure we cover everything you need during the tasting!





-----
Regards,
Andre Raw
​​Catering Event Coordinator
📲 C: (978) 235-3791
📲 W: (978) 381-1212
Facebook | Instagram | Website



To stop receiving these emails, click here

body_text:

check out our full menu yet?

  

I put together an interactive one with all 99+ items and a price calculator:

Just curious — what's been your experience with catering so far? Any
challenges you've faced with other caterers?

  

No pressure at all, just want to make sure we cover everything you need during
the tasting!

  

  
  
  
  
\-----  
Regards,

**Andre Raw**
